summary: Never raise `HTTPException` from a service module (`app/services/`) — services have no HTTP context and become untestable without FastAPI. Raise domain exceptions (`UniverseValidationError`, `UniverseNotFoundError`, etc.) and convert to `HTTPException` in the router handler (`except UniverseValidationError as e: raise HTTPException(400, detail=str(e))`). `starlette.responses` types (e.g. `StreamingResponse`) are acceptable in services since they are data-format, not control-flow, concerns.
